_doc: Spell archetype definitions — RUNTIME SOURCE OF TRUTH (loaded by spell_data.gd::_ensure_loaded). Edit via the Spell Showcase dev tool + export, or by hand. mana_cost + blurb folded in from the former _MANA_COST_TABLE / SPELL_BLURBS. Design rationale lives in docs/spell_archetypes_notes.md.

spell_aura_communion.blurb: Utility aura. Reserves 10 mana while active; kills within 6 cells refund 1 mana. Self-feeds on kill velocity.

spell_aura_grace.blurb: Defensive aura. Reserves 10 mana while active; grants +10% evasion. One-per-defensive-lane. Indefinite duration.

spell_aura_warding.blurb: Defensive aura. Reserves 10 mana while active; -15% incoming spell/elemental damage. One-per-defensive-lane.

spell_aura_wisdom.blurb: Offensive aura. Reserves 12 mana while active; +20% INT-spell damage AND +15% spell cooldown reduction. One-per-offensive-lane.

spell_axes.blurb: Orbits 1+ axes around you for ~2.5s. Each axe damages enemies it touches (per-axe per-enemy cooldown). +1 axe per Spell Projectile affix.

spell_blade_dance.blurb: Whirling melee spin in a 4-tile ring around you. Hits every enemy in the ring (DEX-scaling physical, not spell damage).

spell_cleave.blurb: Heavy STR chop in a wide arc in front of you. One big blow hits every enemy in the cone hard and briefly staggers them. The slow counterpart to Blade Dance's fast flurry.

spell_bolt_long_cd.blurb: Slow heavy bolt to the nearest enemy. Hits hard but cycles slowly (long cooldown).

spell_bone_spear.blurb: Fast piercing shot — passes through enemies and bounces off the first wall once.

spell_chain_lightning.blurb: Lightning bolt to the nearest enemy, then arcs to up to 2 more (additional bounces from Chain Extra Jumps affix). Each bounce deals less damage than the prior.

spell_choking_cloud.blurb: Drops a long-lived dark cloud. Damages enemies inside on every tick (longer DoT window than Venom Cloud).

spell_curse_brittlebone.blurb: Debuff: cursed enemies take +15% damage from all sources AND lose 50% effective armor for 4s. Targets the closest enemy in range; +1 target per Spell Projectile affix.

spell_curse_frailty.blurb: Debuff: cursed enemies take +15% damage from all sources AND lose 50% effective armor for 4s. Targets the closest enemy in range; +1 target per Spell Projectile affix.

spell_drain.blurb: Homing dark bolt. Heals you for a portion of damage dealt (% scales with the Drain Buff affix).

spell_echo_lance.blurb: Lance pierces the first enemy in line, then ricochets once to a nearby unhit enemy (each gets a separate damage roll).

spell_ember_bloom.blurb: Drops a fire patch on the nearest enemy. Burns enemies standing inside for several seconds (duration scales with Spell Duration).

spell_fireball.blurb: Lobs a fireball at the nearest enemy. Explodes for AoE damage on impact. AoE radius scales with Spell Area.

spell_frost_nova.blurb: Radial cold burst around you. Briefly freezes hit enemies. Range scales with Spell Area; freeze duration scales with Spell Duration.

spell_holy_beam.blurb: Holy-element cone toward the nearest enemy. Damages every enemy caught in the arc. Range scales with Spell Area.

spell_iron_shot.blurb: Heavy slow piercing shot — passes through every enemy in its line and hits each once.

spell_magic_dart.blurb: Fast arcane bolt — always hits its target. +1 split per Magic Dart Split affix (each shard hits an additional nearby enemy).

spell_sandblast.blurb: Forward-sweeping dust vortex. Damages every enemy in the swept path. Sweep length scales with Spell Area.

spell_shatter.blurb: Radial physical AoE around you. Briefly stuns hit enemies. Aftershock affix triggers a delayed second AoE 0.6s later.

spell_static_field.blurb: Plants a longer-lived totem than Stormcaller. Continuously zaps the closest enemy in range.

spell_stormcaller_totem.blurb: Plants a totem that zaps the nearest enemy each tick. Brief lifetime, hard per-zap hits.

spell_thorn_aura.blurb: Offensive aura (premium). Reserves 14 mana while active; pulses periodic damage to nearby enemies. One-per-offensive-lane.

spell_venom_cloud.blurb: Drops a poison cloud at the nearest enemy. Damages enemies standing in it every tick (cloud duration scales with Spell Duration).

spell_wisp_servant.blurb: Spawns 1+ orbiting wisps that home into nearby enemies on contact (one hit per wisp). +1 wisp per Spell Projectile affix.

spell_wrath_charge.blurb: Self-buff: +20% melee AND spell damage for 4 seconds. The buff window is fixed — Spell Duration does NOT extend it.
